sqlMap.select: /* CapitalDAO.selectComBasicInfoList */ select COM_NO, COM_NM, COM_NM_EN, CURR_CD, CAPITAL_YN, CMS_USE_YN from ifrs.dbo.tb_company WITH(NOLOCK) order by CAPITAL_YN DESC, CMS_USE_YN DESC, COM_NO
sqlMap.update: /* CapitalDAO.updateComCapitalInfo */ update tb_company set capital_yn = 'Y' ,capital_curr_cd = #capitalCurrCd# ,cms_use_yn = #cmsUseYn# where com_no = #comNo#
sqlMap.select:
/* CapitalDAO.selectCapitalStdAjax */
select * from LIVE_SQL.SGERP.dbo.IFRS_CAPITALSTD WITH(NOLOCK) where CompanySeq = #comNo# and sType=#sType#

/* CapitalDAO.selectCapitalBizAjax */
select CompanySeq, TaxNo, TaxName from LIVE_SQL.SGERP.dbo._TDATaxUnit WITH(NOLOCK) where CompanySeq = #comNo#;

/* CapitalDAO.selectIfrsERPINList */
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.CompanySeq , A.SlipMstSeq , A.SlipMstID , A.AccDate , A.SlipNo , A.RegEmpSeq , A.RegDeptSeq , A.RegAccDate , B.SlipID , B.RowNo , B.AccSeq , B.DrAmt /* , CASE WHEN C.AccNo = '1110102' OR C.AccNo = '1110108' OR C.AccNo = '1110110' OR C.AccNo = '1110114' OR C.AccNo = '1110313' THEN B.DrAmt ELSE B.CrAmt END AS CrAmt */ , B.DrAmt AS CrAmt /* ICM-12337 : 계정번호에 따른 차변/대변 표시 로직 제거, 차변금액을 대변금액로 표시 ( 2022-06-02 - 김연준 ) */ , B.DrForAmt , B.CrForAmt , B.CurrSeq , B.ExRate , B.DivExRate , B.Summary , B.CoCustSeq , C.AccNo , C.AccName , '' AS RemSeq , '' AS RemValSeq , D.DATA AS RemSeqName1 , D.BANKNAME AS RemSeqName2 , 'N' AS linkvalue FROM SGERP.dbo._TACSlip AS A WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT JOIN SGERP.dbo._TACSlipRow AS B WITH(NOLOCK) ON A.CompanySeq = B.CompanySeq AND A.SlipMstSeq = B.SlipMstSeq LEFT JOIN SGERP.dbo._TDAAccount AS C WITH(NOLOCK) ON B.CompanySeq = C.CompanySeq AND B.AccSeq = C.AccSeq LEFT JOIN ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT G.CompanySeq , G.SlipSeq , (G.DATA1 + G.DATA2 + G.DATA3 + G.DATA4) AS DATA , G.BANKNAME FROM ( SELECT R.* FROM ( SELECT A.CompanySeq , A.SlipSeq , ISNULL(C.RemSeqName1, '') AS DATA1 , '' AS DATA2 , '' AS DATA3 , '' AS DATA4 , ISNULL(E.MinorName, '') AS BANKNAME FROM SGERP.dbo._TACSlipRow AS A WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN SGERP.dbo._TACSlipRem AS B WITH(NOLOCK) ON A.CompanySeq = B.CompanySeq AND A.SlipSeq = B.SlipSeq AND B.RemSeq = 1002 LEFT JOIN SGERP.dbo._IFRSRemListView AS C WITH(NOLOCK) ON B.CompanySeq = C.CompanySeq AND B.RemSeq = C.RemSeq AND B.RemValSeq = C.RemSeqVal AND C.RemSeq = 1004 LEFT JOIN SGERP.dbo._TDABank AS D WITH(NOLOCK) ON C.CompanySeq = D.CompanySeq AND C.RemSeqName2 = D.BankSeq LEFT JOIN SGERP.dbo._TDAUMinor AS E WITH(NOLOCK) ON D.CompanySeq = E.CompanySeq AND D.BankHQ = E.MinorSeq WHERE A.AccDate = #sdate# AND A.CompanySeq = #comNo#
UNION ALL
SELECT A.CompanySeq , A.SlipSeq , '' AS DATA1 , ISNULL(C.RemSeqName1, '') AS DATA2 , '' AS DATA3 , '' AS DATA4 , ISNULL(E.MinorName, '') AS BANKNAME FROM SGERP.dbo._TACSlipRow AS A WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN SGERP.dbo._TACSlipRem AS B WITH(NOLOCK) ON A.CompanySeq = B.CompanySeq AND A.SlipSeq = B.SlipSeq AND B.RemSeq = 1004 LEFT JOIN SGERP.dbo._IFRSRemListView AS C WITH(NOLOCK) ON B.CompanySeq = C.CompanySeq AND B.RemSeq = C.RemSeq AND B.RemValSeq = C.RemSeqVal AND C.RemSeq = 1004 LEFT JOIN SGERP.dbo._TDABank AS D WITH(NOLOCK) ON C.CompanySeq = D.CompanySeq AND C.RemSeqName2 = D.BankSeq LEFT JOIN SGERP.dbo._TDAUMinor AS E WITH(NOLOCK) ON D.CompanySeq = E.CompanySeq AND D.BankHQ = E.MinorSeq WHERE A.AccDate = #sdate# AND A.CompanySeq = #comNo#
UNION ALL
SELECT A.CompanySeq , A.SlipSeq , '' AS DATA1 , '' AS DATA2 , ISNULL(C.RemSeqName1, '') AS DATA3 , '' AS DATA4 , ISNULL(E.MinorName, '') AS BANKNAME FROM SGERP.dbo._TACSlipRow AS A WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN SGERP.dbo._TACSlipRem AS B WITH(NOLOCK) ON A.CompanySeq = B.CompanySeq AND A.SlipSeq = B.SlipSeq AND B.RemSeq = 1006 LEFT JOIN SGERP.dbo._IFRSRemListView AS C WITH(NOLOCK) ON B.CompanySeq = C.CompanySeq AND B.RemSeq = C.RemSeq AND B.RemValSeq = C.RemSeqVal AND C.RemSeq = 1004 LEFT JOIN SGERP.dbo._TDABank AS D WITH(NOLOCK) ON C.CompanySeq = D.CompanySeq AND C.RemSeqName2 = D.BankSeq LEFT JOIN SGERP.dbo._TDAUMinor AS E WITH(NOLOCK) ON D.CompanySeq = E.CompanySeq AND D.BankHQ = E.MinorSeq WHERE A.AccDate = #sdate# AND A.CompanySeq = #comNo#
UNION ALL
SELECT A.CompanySeq , A.SlipSeq , '' AS DATA1 , '' AS DATA2 , '' AS DATA3 , ISNULL(C.RemSeqName1, '') AS DATA4 , ISNULL(E.MinorName, '') AS BANKNAME FROM SGERP.dbo._TACSlipRow AS A WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN SGERP.dbo._TACSlipRem AS B WITH(NOLOCK) ON A.CompanySeq = B.CompanySeq AND A.SlipSeq = B.SlipSeq AND B.RemSeq = 1017 LEFT JOIN SGERP.dbo._IFRSRemListView AS C WITH(NOLOCK) ON B.CompanySeq = C.CompanySeq AND B.RemSeq = C.RemSeq AND B.RemValSeq = C.RemSeqVal AND C.RemSeq = 1004 LEFT JOIN SGERP.dbo._TDABank AS D WITH(NOLOCK) ON C.CompanySeq = D.CompanySeq AND C.RemSeqName2 = D.BankSeq LEFT JOIN SGERP.dbo._TDAUMinor AS E WITH(NOLOCK) ON D.CompanySeq = E.CompanySeq AND D.BankHQ = E.MinorSeq WHERE A.AccDate = #sdate# AND A.CompanySeq = #comNo# ) R GROUP BY R.CompanySeq , R.SlipSeq , R.DATA1 , R.DATA2 , R.DATA3 , R.DATA4 , R.BANKNAME ) G ) H WHERE H.DATA != '' ) D ON A.CompanySeq = D.CompanySeq AND B.SlipSeq = D.SlipSeq INNER JOIN SGERP.dbo.IFRS_CAPITALSTD AS G WITH(NOLOCK) ON A.CompanySeq = G.CompanySeq AND G.sType = 1 AND C.AccNo = G.sData ) T1 WHERE T1.CompanySeq = #comNo# AND T1.AccDate = #sdate# AND T1.CrAmt != 0 ORDER BY T1.CrAmt DESC

/* CapitalDAO.selectIfrsERPINList2 */
SELECT A.CompanySeq, A.SlipMstSeq, A.SlipMstID, A.AccDate, A.SlipNo, A.RegEmpSeq, A.RegDeptSeq, A.RegAccDate, B.SlipID, B.RowNo, B.AccSeq, B.AccSeq as accseq2, B.DrAmt, CASE WHEN C.AccNo = '1111560' OR C.AccNo = '1111532' THEN B.DrAmt ELSE B.CrAmt END AS domamt, B.DrForAmt, B.CrForAmt, B.CurrSeq, B.ExRate, B.DivExRate, B.Summary as Summary, B.Summary as Summary2, B.CoCustSeq, C.AccNo, CASE WHEN C.AccNo = '1111532' THEN '여비교통비' ELSE '전도금' END AS AccName, CASE WHEN C.AccNo = '1111532' THEN '여비교통비' ELSE '전도금' END AS AccName2, '' as RemSeq, D.RemValSeq, D.RemValSeq as RemValSeq1, '거래처' as remname1, E.RemSeqName1 as remvalname1, E.RemSeq, E.RemSeqVal, E.RemSeqName1, E.RemSeqName2, 'N' as linkvalue FROM SGERP.dbo._TACSlip A WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT JOIN SGERP.dbo._TACSlipRow B WITH(NOLOCK) ON B.CompanySeq = A.CompanySeq AND A.SlipMstSeq = B.SlipMstSeq LEFT JOIN SGERP.dbo._TDAAccount C WITH(NOLOCK) ON C.CompanySeq = A.CompanySeq AND B.AccSeq = C.AccSeq LEFT JOIN SGERP.dbo._TACSlipRem D WITH(NOLOCK) ON A.CompanySeq = D.CompanySeq AND B.SlipSeq = D.SlipSeq LEFT JOIN SGERP.dbo._IFRSRemListView E WITH(NOLOCK) ON A.CompanySeq = E.CompanySeq AND D.RemSeq = E.RemSeq AND D.RemValSeq = E.RemSeqVal WHERE A.CompanySeq = #comNo# AND A.AccDate = #sdate# AND (C.AccNo = '1111532' OR C.AccNo = '1111560')

/* CapitalDAO.selectIfrsERPMaxAjax */
select top 1 C.AccName, B.Summary from SGERP.dbo._TACSlip A WITH(NOLOCK) inner join SGERP.dbo._TACSlipRow B WITH(NOLOCK) on A.CompanySeq = B.CompanySeq and A.SlipMstSeq = B.SlipMstSeq inner join SGERP.dbo._TDAAccount C WITH(NOLOCK) on A.CompanySeq = C.CompanySeq and B.AccSeq = C.AccSeq where A.CompanySeq=#comNo# and A.SlipMstSeq=#SlipMstSeq# order by DrAmt desc

/* CapitalDAO.selectERPINReport */
select * from IFRS.dbo.TB_CAPITAL_LIST WITH(NOLOCK) where 1=1 AND
sType=1 and
sType=11 and
sType=2 and
sType=22 and
sType like '%' and
(sType=1 or sType=2) and
(sType=11 or sType=22) and
companyseq=#comNo# and sDate=#sdate# order by sType DESC, cramt DESC;
select * from IFRS.dbo.TB_CAPITAL_LIST_BAK WITH(NOLOCK) where 1=1 AND
sType=1 and
sType=11 and
sType=2 and
sType=22 and
sType like '%' and
(sType=1 or sType=2) and
(sType=11 or sType=22) and
companyseq=#comNo# and sDate=#sdate# order by sType DESC, cramt DESC;
sqlMap.insert: /* CapitalDAO.saveMail */ MERGE INTO IfrsMailList A USING ( SELECT #companyseq# AS companyseq ) B ON (A.companyseq = B.companyseq) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET fromuser=#fromuser#, fromuser_id=#fromuser_id#, touser=#touser#, touser_id=#touser_id#, attuser=#attuser#, attuser_id=#attuser_id#, bccuser=#bccuser#, bccuser_id=#bccuser_id# WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( companyseq, fromuser, fromuser_id, touser, touser_id, attuser, attuser_id, bccuser, bccuser_id ) VALUES ( #companyseq#, #fromuser#, #fromuser_id#, #touser#, #touser_id#, #attuser#, #attuser_id#, #bccuser#, #bccuser_id# );
sqlMap.select:
/* CapitalDAO.selectMail */
select * from IfrsMailList WITH(NOLOCK) where companyseq = #companyseq#;

/* CapitalDAO.holyday */
SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(T1.HOLYPARAM) AS CNT FROM (SELECT REPLACE(CONVERT(CHAR(10),BASEDATE, 120),'-','') AS HOLYDAY, CASE WHEN DATEPART(DW, BASEDATE ) = '1' OR DATEPART(DW, BASEDATE ) = '7' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS HOLYPARAM FROM SGWORK.dbo.TB_HOLIDAY WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE COM_CD = 'H0000000') T1 WHERE T1.HOLYDAY = #serdate#) > 0 OR (SELECT CASE WHEN DATEPART(DW, #serdate# ) = '1' OR DATEPART(DW, #serdate# ) = '7' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS HOLYPARAM) = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS HOLYPARAM

/* CapitalDAO.week */
SELECT B.* FROM SGERPMA.dbo.TB_WEEK_CALENDAR_ROW A WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT JOIN SGERPMA.dbo.TB_WEEK_CALENDAR B WITH(NOLOCK) ON A.Y = B.E_YEAR AND A.M = B.E_MONTH AND A.W = B.E_WEEK WHERE A.BASEDATE = #serdate#
sqlMap.insert: /* CapitalDAO.insertSendMail */ INSERT INTO IFRS.DBO.ALERT_QUEUE ( CREATE_DATE, UPDATE_DATE, SEND_DATE, ALERT_STATUS, ALERT_TYPE, from_id, FROM_NAME, FROM_MAIL, TO_ID, TO_MAIL, ALERT_SUBJECT, ALERT_MESSAGE, APP_TYPE, APP_ID, PRIORITY ) VALUES ( GETDATE(), GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE(), #alertStatus#, #alertType#, #fromId#, #fromName#, #fromMail#, #toId#, #toMail#, #alertSubject#, #alertMessage#, #appType#, #appId#, #priority# )
sqlMap.select:
/* CapitalDAO.IfrsPreviousWeekEndDate */
SELECT MAX(SDATE) sDate FROM TB_CAPITAL_ASSET A WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN SGERPMA.dbo.TB_WEEK_CALENDAR_ROW B WITH(NOLOCK) ON A.SDATE = B.BASEDATE WHERE STYPE = 8 AND COMPANYSEQ = 2 AND CONVERT(NVARCHAR(8), DATEADD(DAY,-7, #sdate#), 112) <= SDATE AND SDATE < #sdate# AND B.WN NOT IN ('토', '일')

/* CapitalDAO.IfrsWeekReport1 */
SELECT companyseq , sType , sDate , cramt * ISNULL(T.EXCHANGE_RATE, 1) / 1000000 AS cramt FROM ( SELECT A.companyseq, A.sType, A.sDate, sum(cramt) as cramt FROM IFRS.dbo.TB_CAPITAL_LIST A WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN SGERPMA.dbo.TB_WEEK_CALENDAR_ROW B WITH(NOLOCK)ON A.sDate = B.BASEDATE WHERE A.sType = 1 AND A.sDate >= #sdate# and A.sDate <= #edate# AND B.WN != '토' AND B.WN !='일' AND A.COMPANYSEQ = #companyseq# GROUP BY A.companyseq,A.sType,A.sDate UNION ALL SELECT A.companyseq, A.sType, A.sDate, sum(cramt) as cramt FROM IFRS.dbo.TB_CAPITAL_LIST A WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN SGERPMA.dbo.TB_WEEK_CALENDAR_ROW B WITH(NOLOCK) ON A.sDate = B.BASEDATE WHERE A.sType = 2 AND A.sDate >= #sdate# and A.sDate <= #edate# AND B.WN != '토' AND B.WN !='일' AND A.COMPANYSEQ = #companyseq# GROUP BY A.companyseq,A.sType,A.sDate UNION ALL SELECT T1.COMPANYSEQ, '3' AS sType, T1.sDate, SUM(T1.SUM4) AS SUM4 FROM (SELECT COMPANYSEQ, SDATE, SUM(SUM4) AS SUM4 FROM TB_CAPITAL_ASSET WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SDATE >= #serdate# AND SDATE <= #edate# AND STYPE != 8 AND COMPANYSEQ = #companyseq# GROUP BY COMPANYSEQ,SDATE UNION ALL SELECT COMPANYSEQ, SDATE, SUM(SUM4) * -1 AS SUM4 FROM TB_CAPITAL_ASSET WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SDATE >= #serdate# AND SDATE <= #edate# AND STYPE = 8 AND SDATA1 LIKE '담보제공금액' AND COMPANYSEQ = #companyseq# GROUP BY COMPANYSEQ,SDATE) T1 LEFT OUTER JOIN SGERPMA.dbo.TB_WEEK_CALENDAR_ROW B WITH(NOLOCK) ON T1.SDATE = B.BASEDATE WHERE B.WN NOT IN ('토', '일') GROUP BY T1.COMPANYSEQ, T1.SDATE ) Z LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT ISNULL(EXCHANGE_RATE, 1) AS EXCHANGE_RATE, CONVERT(int,CONVERT(char(8), CONVERT(date, REGIST_DT),112)) AS REGIST_DT FROM dbo.TB_DAY_EXCHANGE WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE CURR_CD = #curr# ) T ON T.REGIST_DT = Z.sDate WHERE Z.companyseq = #companyseq#
AND Z.sType = #sType#
ORDER BY Z.sDate, Z.companyseq, Z.sType

/* CapitalDAO.weekList */
SELECT BASEDATE FROM SGERPMA.dbo.TB_WEEK_CALENDAR_ROW WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE BASEDATE >= #serdate# AND BASEDATE <= #edate#

/* CapitalDAO.IfrsWeekReport2 */
WITH reportData (comNm, currCd, Jumin_Biz_No, incom_Amt, out_Amt, bal_Money, Tran_Dd) AS ( SELECT TB.comNm , TB.currCd , TB.Jumin_Biz_No , SUM(TB.incom_Amt) AS incom_Amt , SUM(TB.out_Amt) AS out_Amt , SUM(TB.bal_Money) AS bal_Money , #registDt# AS Tran_Dd FROM ( SELECT 사업자.Headsubaff_Corp_Nm AS comNm , 계좌.Cur_Cd AS currCd , SUM(CASE WHEN 상세.Tran_Dd != #registDt# THEN 0 ELSE Isnull(상세.Incom_Amt,0) END) AS incom_Amt , SUM(CASE WHEN 상세.Tran_Dd != #registDt# THEN 0 ELSE Isnull(상세.Out_Amt,0) END) AS out_Amt , SUM(Isnull(상세.Bal_Money,0)) AS bal_Money , 사업자.Jumin_Biz_No AS Jumin_Biz_No FROM [INHOUSEPLUS].[INHOUSEPLUS].[dbo].Head_Offic_Subcom_Affil_Com AS 사업자 WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN [INHOUSEPLUS].[INHOUSEPLUS].[dbo].Acct_Consol_Inf_Mgr AS 계좌 WITH(NOLOCK) ON 사업자.Jumin_Biz_No = 계좌.Jumin_Biz_No LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT Acct_Uniqid , MAX(Tran_Dd) AS 거래일자 FROM [INHOUSEPLUS].[INHOUSEPLUS].[dbo].Tr_Summ_Inf WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE Tran_Dd <= #registDt# GROUP BY Acct_Uniqid ) AS 요약 ON 계좌.Acct_Uniqid = 요약.Acct_Uniqid LEFT OUTER JOIN [INHOUSEPLUS].[INHOUSEPLUS].[dbo].Tr_Summ_Inf AS 상세 WITH(NOLOCK) ON 요약.Acct_Uniqid = 상세.Acct_Uniqid AND 요약.거래일자 = 상세.Tran_Dd LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT Acct_Uniqid FROM [INHOUSEPLUS].[INHOUSEPLUS].[dbo].Acct_Consol_Inf_Mgr WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE Acct_Uniqid NOT IN (SELECT Stridno FROM [INHOUSEPLUS].[INHOUSEPLUS].[dbo].Auth_Mgr WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE Struser_Id = 'SGCMSSC') ) AS 계좌권한all ON 계좌.Acct_Uniqid = 계좌권한all.Acct_Uniqid WHERE 1=1 AND 사업자.Del_Yn != 'Y' AND 계좌.Del_Yn != 'Y' AND Isnull(계좌권한all.Acct_Uniqid, '') != '' GROUP BY 사업자.Jumin_Biz_No ,사업자.Headsubaff_Corpgb , 계좌.Cur_Cd, Isnull(계좌.H_Fin_Cd, 계좌.Fin_Cd) , 사업자.Headsubaff_Corp_Nm, 계좌.ACCT_NO ) TB WHERE 1 = 1 /* [ICM-10717] 싱가포르 법인 4사 예외 처리 제거 ( 2021.11.30 : 김연준 ) */ /* AND TB.Jumin_Biz_No IN ('0490004133', '0490004132', '0490004131', '0400000319') */ /* [ICM-9994] PI 법인번호 추가 ( 0400000319 : PI, 0490004131 : SAM, 0490004132 : SGIG, 0490004133 : SGWW ) ( 2021.10.19 : 김연준 ) */ GROUP BY TB.comNm, TB.currCd, TB.Jumin_Biz_No) SELECT A.CURR_CD , C.incom_Amt * ISNULL(EXCHANGE_RATE, 1) / 1000000 AS incom_Amt , C.out_Amt * ISNULL(EXCHANGE_RATE, 1) / 1000000 AS out_Amt , C.bal_Money * ISNULL(EXCHANGE_RATE, 1) / 1000000 AS bal_Money , C.Tran_Dd AS sDate FROM dbo.TB_COMPANY_BASE_INFO A WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN dbo.TB_COMPANY B WITH(NOLOCK) ON A.COM_NO = B.COM_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN reportData C WITH(NOLOCK) ON B.cms_company_no = C.Jumin_Biz_No AND A.CURR_CD = C.currCd LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT EXCHANGE_RATE, CONVERT(int,CONVERT(char(8), CONVERT(date, REGIST_DT),112)) AS REGIST_DT FROM dbo.TB_DAY_EXCHANGE WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE CURR_CD = #curr#) D ON D.REGIST_DT = C.Tran_Dd WHERE A.COM_NO = #companyseq# AND A.CURR_CD = #curr# AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND B.CMS_YN = 'Y'

/* CapitalDAO.IfrsWeekReport3 */
SELECT companyseq, COM_NM_EN, sDate, sType, cramt / 100000000 AS cramt, accname, remseqname1, summary, CURR_CD AS currCd FROM( SELECT T.companyseq, T.COM_NM_EN, T.sDate, T.sType, SUM(T.cramt) * ISNULL(T.EXCHANGE_RATE, 1) AS cramt, (T.accname) AS accname, (T.remseqname1) AS remseqname1, (T.summary) AS summary, T.CURR_CD FROM (SELECT A.sType, A.companyseq, B.COM_NM_EN, A.sDate, A.accno, A.accname, A.remname1, A.remseqname1, A.summary, A.cramt, C.EXCHANGE_RATE, C.CURR_CD FROM TB_CAPITAL_LIST A WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_COMPANY B WITH(NOLOCK) ON A.companyseq = B.COM_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT EXCHANGE_RATE, CONVERT(int,CONVERT(char(8), CONVERT(date, REGIST_DT),112)) AS REGIST_DT, CURR_CD FROM dbo.TB_DAY_EXCHANGE WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE CURR_CD = #curr#) C ON C.REGIST_DT = A.sDate WHERE (STYPE = 1 OR STYPE = 2) AND SDATE >= #serdate# AND SDATE <= #edate# AND COMPANYSEQ = #companyseq#) T group by T.companyseq, T.COM_NM_EN, T.sDate, T.sType, T.accname, T.remseqname1, T.summary, T.EXCHANGE_RATE, T.CURR_CD) Z WHERE Z.cramt >= 100000000 ORDER BY Z.companyseq, Z.sDate, Z.sType DESC, Z.cramt DESC

/* CapitalDAO.IfrsWeekReport4 */
SELECT Z.docNo, Z.companyseq, Z.sType, Z.sDate, Z.accname, Z.remseqname1, Z.summary, Z.cramt, Z.comNmEn, Z.CURR_CD, Z.comOrder FROM ( SELECT T.docNo, T.companyseq, T.sType, T.sDate, T.accname, T.remseqname1, T.summary, T.cramt, T.comNmEn, T1.CURR_CD, T.comOrder FROM TB_CAPITAL_LIST_COPY T WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT EXCHANGE_RATE, CONVERT(int,CONVERT(char(8), CONVERT(date, REGIST_DT),112)) AS REGIST_DT, CURR_CD FROM dbo.TB_DAY_EXCHANGE WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE CURR_CD = #curr#) T1 ON T1.REGIST_DT = T.sDate WHERE T.companyseq = #companyseq# AND T.sDate >= #serdate# AND T.sDate <= #edate# AND T.delYn = 'N' UNION ALL SELECT '' AS docNo, companyseq, sType, sDate, accname, remseqname1, summary, CONVERT(VARCHAR, cramt / 100000000) AS cramt, COM_NM_EN, CURR_CD AS currCd, COM_ORDER AS comOrder FROM ( SELECT X.companyseq, X.sType, X.sDate, SUM(X.cramt) * ISNULL(X.EXCHANGE_RATE, 1) AS cramt, (X.accname) AS accname, (X.remseqname1) AS remseqname1, (X.summary) AS summary, X.COM_NM_EN, X.CURR_CD, X.COM_ORDER FROM ( SELECT T.DocNo, T.sType, T.companyseq, T1.COM_NM_EN, T.sDate, T.accno, T.accname, T.remname1, T.remseqname1, T.summary, T.cramt, T2.EXCHANGE_RATE, T2.CURR_CD, T3.COM_ORDER FROM TB_CAPITAL_LIST T LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_COMPANY T1 WITH(NOLOCK) ON T.companyseq = T1.COM_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT EXCHANGE_RATE, CONVERT(int,CONVERT(char(8), CONVERT(date, REGIST_DT),112)) AS REGIST_DT, CURR_CD FROM dbo.TB_DAY_EXCHANGE WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE CURR_CD = #curr#) T2 ON T2.REGIST_DT = T.sDate INNER JOIN dbo.TB_COMPANY_BASE_INFO T3 WITH(NOLOCK) ON T1.COM_NO = T3.COM_NO AND T3.USE_YN = 'Y' WHERE (sType = 1 OR sType = 2) AND sDate >= #serdate# AND sDate <= #edate# AND companyseq = #companyseq# AND sDate NOT IN (SELECT sDate FROM TB_CAPITAL_LIST_COPY WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE sDate >= #serdate# AND sDate <= #edate#)) X group by X.companyseq, X.COM_NM_EN, X.sDate, X.sType, X.accname, X.remseqname1, X.summary, X.EXCHANGE_RATE, X.CURR_CD, X.COM_ORDER) Y WHERE Y.cramt >= 100000000) Z

/* CapitalDAO.IfrsWeekReportCms */
WITH reportData (comNm, currCd, Jumin_Biz_No,incom_Amt, out_Amt, bal_Money, Tran_Dd) AS ( SELECT TB.comNm , TB.currCd , TB.Jumin_Biz_No , SUM(TB.incom_Amt) AS incom_Amt , SUM(TB.out_Amt) AS out_Amt , SUM(TB.bal_Money) AS bal_Money , #registDt# AS Tran_Dd FROM ( SELECT 사업자.Headsubaff_Corp_Nm AS comNm , 계좌.Cur_Cd AS currCd , SUM(CASE WHEN 상세.Tran_Dd != #registDt# THEN 0 ELSE Isnull(상세.Incom_Amt,0) END) AS incom_Amt , SUM(CASE WHEN 상세.Tran_Dd != #registDt# THEN 0 ELSE Isnull(상세.Out_Amt,0) END) AS out_Amt , SUM(Isnull(상세.Bal_Money,0)) AS bal_Money , 사업자.Jumin_Biz_No AS Jumin_Biz_No FROM [INHOUSEPLUS].[INHOUSEPLUS].[dbo].Head_Offic_Subcom_Affil_Com AS 사업자 WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN [INHOUSEPLUS].[INHOUSEPLUS].[dbo].Acct_Consol_Inf_Mgr AS 계좌 WITH(NOLOCK) ON 사업자.Jumin_Biz_No = 계좌.Jumin_Biz_No LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT Acct_Uniqid , MAX(Tran_Dd) AS 거래일자 FROM [INHOUSEPLUS].[INHOUSEPLUS].[dbo].Tr_Summ_Inf WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE Tran_Dd <= #registDt# GROUP BY Acct_Uniqid ) AS 요약 ON 계좌.Acct_Uniqid = 요약.Acct_Uniqid LEFT OUTER JOIN [INHOUSEPLUS].[INHOUSEPLUS].[dbo].Tr_Summ_Inf AS 상세 WITH(NOLOCK) ON 요약.Acct_Uniqid = 상세.Acct_Uniqid AND 요약.거래일자 = 상세.Tran_Dd LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT Acct_Uniqid FROM [INHOUSEPLUS].[INHOUSEPLUS].[dbo].Acct_Consol_Inf_Mgr WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE Acct_Uniqid NOT IN (SELECT Stridno FROM [INHOUSEPLUS].[INHOUSEPLUS].[dbo].Auth_Mgr WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE Struser_Id = 'SGCMSSC') ) AS 계좌권한all ON 계좌.Acct_Uniqid = 계좌권한all.Acct_Uniqid WHERE 1=1 AND 사업자.Del_Yn != 'Y' AND 계좌.Del_Yn != 'Y' AND Isnull(계좌권한all.Acct_Uniqid, '') != '' GROUP BY 사업자.Jumin_Biz_No ,사업자.Headsubaff_Corpgb , 계좌.Cur_Cd, Isnull(계좌.H_Fin_Cd, 계좌.Fin_Cd) , 사업자.Headsubaff_Corp_Nm, 계좌.ACCT_NO ) TB WHERE 1 = 1 /* [ICM-10717] 싱가포르 법인 4사 예외 처리 제거 ( 2021.11.30 : 김연준 ) */ /* AND TB.Jumin_Biz_No IN ('0490004133', '0490004132', '0490004131', '0400000319') */ /* [ICM-9994] PI 법인번호 추가 ( 0400000319 : PI, 0490004131 : SAM, 0490004132 : SGIG, 0490004133 : SGWW ) ( 2021.10.19 : 김연준 ) */ GROUP BY TB.comNm, TB.currCd, TB.Jumin_Biz_No) SELECT Z.docNo, Z.companyseq, Z.sType, Z.sDate, Z.accname, Z.remseqname1, Z.summary, Z.cramt, Z.comNmEn, Z.CURR_CD, Z.comOrder FROM ( SELECT T.docNo, T.companyseq, T.sType, T.sDate, T.accname, T.remseqname1, T.summary, T.cramt, T.comNmEn, T1.CURR_CD, T.comOrder FROM TB_CAPITAL_LIST_COPY T WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT EXCHANGE_RATE, CONVERT(int,CONVERT(char(8), CONVERT(date, REGIST_DT),112)) AS REGIST_DT, CURR_CD FROM dbo.TB_DAY_EXCHANGE WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE CURR_CD = #curr#) T1 ON T1.REGIST_DT = T.sDate WHERE T.companyseq = #companyseq# AND T.sDate = #registDt# AND T.delYn = 'N' UNION ALL SELECT '' AS docNo, T.COM_NO, '1' AS sType, T2.Tran_Dd AS sDate, '' AS accname, '' AS remseqname1, '' AS summary, T2.incom_Amt * ISNULL(EXCHANGE_RATE, 1) / 1000000 AS incom_Amt, T1.COM_NM_EN, T.CURR_CD, T.COM_ORDER FROM dbo.TB_COMPANY_BASE_INFO T WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN dbo.TB_COMPANY T1 WITH(NOLOCK) ON T.COM_NO = T1.COM_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN reportData T2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON T1.cms_company_no = T2.Jumin_Biz_No AND T.CURR_CD = T2.currCd LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT EXCHANGE_RATE, CONVERT(int,CONVERT(char(8), CONVERT(date, REGIST_DT),112)) AS REGIST_DT FROM dbo.TB_DAY_EXCHANGE WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE CURR_CD = #curr#) T3 ON T3.REGIST_DT = T2.Tran_Dd WHERE T.COM_NO = #companyseq# AND T.CURR_CD = #curr# AND T.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T1.CMS_YN = 'Y' AND ISNULL(T2.incom_Amt, 0) > 0 AND T2.Tran_Dd NOT IN (SELECT sDate FROM TB_CAPITAL_LIST_COPY WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE sDate = #registDt#) UNION ALL SELECT '' AS docNo, T.COM_NO, '2' AS sType, T2.Tran_Dd AS sDate, '' AS accname, '' AS remseqname1, '' AS summary, T2.out_Amt * ISNULL(EXCHANGE_RATE, 1) / 1000000 AS out_Amt, T1.COM_NM_EN, T.CURR_CD, T.COM_ORDER FROM dbo.TB_COMPANY_BASE_INFO T WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN dbo.TB_COMPANY T1 WITH(NOLOCK) ON T.COM_NO = T1.COM_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN reportData T2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON T1.cms_company_no = T2.Jumin_Biz_No AND T.CURR_CD = T2.currCd LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT EXCHANGE_RATE, CONVERT(int,CONVERT(char(8), CONVERT(date, REGIST_DT),112)) AS REGIST_DT FROM dbo.TB_DAY_EXCHANGE WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE CURR_CD = #curr#) T3 ON T3.REGIST_DT = T2.Tran_Dd WHERE T.COM_NO = #companyseq# AND T.CURR_CD = #curr# AND T.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T1.CMS_YN = 'Y' AND ISNULL(T2.out_Amt, 0) > 0 AND T2.Tran_Dd NOT IN (SELECT sDate FROM TB_CAPITAL_LIST_COPY WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE sDate = #registDt#)) Z

/* CapitalDAO.IfrsWeekReport7 */
select top 1 * from TB_CAPITAL_LIST_WEEK WITH(NOLOCK) where companylist = #companylist# and datevalue = #datevalue#;

/* CapitalDAO.IfrsWeekReport5 */
select A.DocNo, CASE WHEN A.sType = 2 THEN '입금' ELSE '출금' END AS sType, A.companyseq, B.COM_NM_EN, A.sDate, A.accno, A.accname, A.remname1, A.remseqname1, A.summary, A.cramt * ISNULL(C.EXCHANGE_RATE, 1) AS cramt from TB_CAPITAL_LIST A WITH(NOLOCK) left join TB_COMPANY B WITH(NOLOCK) on A.companyseq = B.COM_NO LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT EXCHANGE_RATE, CONVERT(int,CONVERT(char(8), CONVERT(date, REGIST_DT),112)) AS REGIST_DT FROM dbo.TB_DAY_EXCHANGE WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE CURR_CD = #curr#) C ON C.REGIST_DT = A.sDate where A.sDate = #sdate# and (A.sType = 2 or A.sType = 1) and companyseq = #companyseq# order by A.sDate, A.sType

/* CapitalDAO.IfrsWeekReport6 */
select COM_NM_EN from TB_COMPANY WITH(NOLOCK) where COM_NO = #companylist#
sqlMap.insert: /* CapitalDAO.IfrsWeekReport8 */ MERGE INTO TB_CAPITAL_LIST_USERSET A USING ( SELECT #sYear# AS sYear, #sMonth# AS sMonth, #week# AS week ) B ON (A.sYear = B.sYear AND A.sMonth = B.sMonth AND A.week = B.week) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET sYear = #sYear#, sMonth = #sMonth#, week = #week#, companylist = #companylist#, weekly = #weekly# WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( sYear, sMonth, week, weekly, companylist ) VALUES ( #sYear#, #sMonth#, #week#, #weekly#, #companylist# );
sqlMap.select:
/* CapitalDAO.IfrsWeekReport9 */
SELECT * FROM TB_CAPITAL_LIST_USERSET WITH(NOLOCK)
WHERE weekly = #weekly#
WHERE sYear = #sYear# AND sMonth = #sMonth# AND week = #week#
sqlMap.insert: /* CapitalDAO.IfrsWeekReport11 */ MERGE INTO TB_CAPITAL_LIST_IMGSRC A USING ( SELECT #companyseq# AS companyseq, #stype# AS stype, #sdate# AS sdate ) B ON (A.companyseq = B.companyseq and A.stype = B.stype and A.sdate = B.sdate) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET imgsrc = #imgsrc#, UPT_ID = #registId#, /* ICM-11763 : 예적금 현황작성 / 현금출납장 작성 저장시 수정자 ID 추가 ( 2022-03-15 : 김연준 ) */ UPT_DT = GETDATE() /* ICM-11763 : 예적금 현황작성 / 현금출납장 작성 저장시 수정일자 추가 ( 2022-03-15 : 김연준 ) */ WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( companyseq, stype, sdate, imgsrc, INS_ID, /* ICM-11763 : 예적금 현황작성 / 현금출납장 작성 저장시 등록자 ID 추가 ( 2022-03-15 : 김연준 ) */ INS_DT /* ICM-11763 : 예적금 현황작성 / 현금출납장 작성 저장시 등록일자 추가 ( 2022-03-15 : 김연준 ) */ ) VALUES ( #companyseq#, #stype#, #sdate#, #imgsrc#, #registId#, /* ICM-11763 : 예적금 현황작성 / 현금출납장 작성 저장시 등록자 ID 추가 ( 2022-03-15 : 김연준 ) */ GETDATE() /* ICM-11763 : 예적금 현황작성 / 현금출납장 작성 저장시 등록일자 추가 ( 2022-03-15 : 김연준 ) */ );
sqlMap.select:
/* CapitalDAO.IfrsWeekReport12 */
select * from TB_CAPITAL_LIST_IMGSRC WITH(NOLOCK) where companyseq = #companyseq# and sdate = #sdate#;
sqlMap.insert: /* CapitalDAO.insertCapitalComment */ MERGE INTO TB_CAPITAL_COMMENT A USING ( SELECT #companyseq# AS COMPANYSEQ, #datevalue# AS DATE_VALUE ) B ON (A.COMPANYSEQ = B.COMPANYSEQ AND A.DATE_VALUE = B.DATE_VALUE) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET COMPANYSEQ = #companyseq#, COMMENT = #comment# WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( COMPANYSEQ , COMMENT , DATE_VALUE , USE_YN , REGIST_ID , REGIST_DT ) VALUES ( #companyseq# , #comment# , #datevalue# , 'Y' , #registId# , GETDATE() );
sqlMap.select:
/* CapitalDAO.IfrsWeekRate */
select * from TB_CAPITAL_LIST_RATE WITH(NOLOCK) where companylist = #companylist# and datevalue = #datevalue#

/* CapitalDAO.IfrsWeekRateList */
select datevalue, currCd, max(rate) as rate from TB_CAPITAL_LIST_RATE WITH(NOLOCK) where datevalue = #datevalue# group by datevalue, currCd

/* CapitalDAO.mailsendlogAjax */
select T1.CREATE_DATE, T2.USER_NM AS FromNm, T1.FROM_ID, T1.FROM_MAIL, T3.USER_NM AS ToNm, T1.TO_ID, T1.TO_MAIL, T1.ALERT_SUBJECT, T1.ERR_MSG from (select convert(int, convert(char(8), CREATE_DATE, 112)) AS CREATE_DATE, FROM_ID, FROM_MAIL, TO_ID, TO_MAIL, ALERT_SUBJECT, '성공' AS ERR_MSG from IFRS.DBO.ALERT_QUEUE WITH(NOLOCK) where convert(int, convert(char(8), CREATE_DATE, 112)) = #sdate# and FROM_NAME = 'EFIS' ) T1 left join FIM.dbo.TB_USER T2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON T1.FROM_ID = T2.LOGON_ID left join FIM.dbo.TB_USER T3 WITH(NOLOCK) ON T1.TO_ID = T3.LOGON_ID order by T1.CREATE_DATE

/* CapitalDAO.selectCapitalVrify */ SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(VRIFY_DATE) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END VRIFY_YN FROM TB_CAPITAL_VRIFY WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE 1=1
COM_NO = '2'
COM_NO = #comNo#
AND VRIFY_DATE = #vrifyDate#
sqlMap.insert: /* CapitalDAO.insertCapitalVrify */ INSERT INTO TB_CAPITAL_VRIFY (COM_NO, VRIFY_DATE, INS_ID, INS_DT, UPT_ID, UPT_DT) VALUES (#comNo#, #vrifyDate#, #insId#, GETDATE(), #insId#, GETDATE())
sqlMap.select: /* CapitalDAO.getComment */ WITH BASIC(COMMENT, DATEVALUE) AS ( SELECT COMMENT, DATE_VALUE AS DATEVALUE FROM TB_CAPITAL_COMMENT WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE COMPANYSEQ = #companyseq# AND DATE_VALUE = #weekly# ), PREV(COMMENT, DATEVALUE) AS ( SELECT TOP(1) COMMENT, DATE_VALUE AS DATEVALUE FROM TB_CAPITAL_COMMENT WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE COMPANYSEQ = #companyseq# ORDER BY COMMENT_SEQ DESC ) SELECT DISTINCT TB.COMMENT , TB.DATEVALUE FROM ( SELECT COMMENT,DATEVALUE FROM BASIC UNION ALL SELECT COMMENT,DATEVALUE FROM PREV ) TB

/* CapitalDAO.selectCapitalCompanyList */ SELECT A.COM_BASE_SEQ , A.SECTION_TYPE , A.COM_NO , A.COM_NICK_NM , A.CURR_CD , A.COM_ORDER , B.CMS_YN , B.CMS_COMPANY_NM , B.COM_NM , B.COM_NM_EN FROM dbo.TB_COMPANY_BASE_INFO A WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN dbo.TB_COMPANY B WITH(NOLOCK) ON A.COM_NO = B.COM_NO WHERE A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.COM_ORDER ASC

/* CapitalDAO.selectDayExchangeList */
SELECT EXCHANGE_RATE AS rate, CURR_CD, REGIST_DT FROM TB_DAY_EXCHANGE WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE REGIST_DT >= #serdate# AND REGIST_DT <= #edate# AND CURR_CD = #curr#

/* CapitalDAO.selectCapitalHistory */ SELECT DocNo AS docNo , sType , companyseq , sDate , accname , remseqname1 , summary , cramt , comNmEn , comOrder FROM TB_CAPITAL_LIST_COPY WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE companyseq = #companyseq# AND sType = #sType# AND sDate = #sDate# AND delYn = 'N'
sqlMap.insert: /* CapitalDAO.insertCapitalHistory */ INSERT INTO TB_CAPITAL_LIST_COPY ( sType , companyseq , sDate , accname , remseqname1 , summary , cramt , comNmEn , comOrder , delYn ) VALUES ( #sType# , #companyseq# , #sDate# , #accname# , #remseqname1# , #summary# , #cramt# , #comNmEn# , #comOrder# , 'N' )
sqlMap.update: /* CapitalDAO.deleteCapitalHistory */ UPDATE TB_CAPITAL_LIST_COPY SET delYn = 'Y' WHERE sDate = #sDate# AND DocNo = #docNo#
/* CapitalDAO.updateCapitalHistory */ UPDATE TB_CAPITAL_LIST_COPY SET cramt = #cramt# , sType = #sType# , summary = #summary# WHERE DocNo = #docNo#
sqlMap.delete: /* CapitalDAO.deleteUserSet */ DELETE FROM TB_CAPITAL_LIST_USERSET WHERE sYear = #sYear# AND sMonth = #sMonth# AND week = #week#
sqlMap.select:
/* CapitalDAO.selectCompanyGraphSetting */ SELECT COM_NO ,COM_NO AS COM_NO_OLD /* 수정 변경 용도 */ ,MAX_AMT
,SPLIT_INTERVAL
FROM TB_COMPANY_GRAPH_SETTING WITH(NOLOCK)
WHERE 1 = 1
AND COM_NO = #comNo#
ORDER BY MAX_AMT DESC

/* CapitalDAO.selectErpYn */
SELECT COM_DIV FROM TB_COMPANY WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE COM_NO = ISNULL(#comNo#, 0)

/* CapitalDAO.selectLastSaveSdate */
SELECT ISNULL(MAX(sdate),'') as sdate FROM TB_CAPITAL_ASSET WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE 1=1 AND companyseq = #comNo# AND sdate <= #sdate#

/* CapitalDAO.selectLoadSaveDataForReport */ SELECT B.DocNo , B.stype , B.companyseq , B.sdate , B.sdata1 , B.sdata2 , B.sdata3 , B.sdata4 , B.sdata5 , B.sdata6 , B.summary , B.sum1 , B.sum2 , B.sum3 , B.sum4 FROM ( SELECT A.DocNo , A.stype , A.companyseq , A.sdate , CASE WHEN A.stype BETWEEN 3 AND 7 THEN A.sdata2 WHEN A.stype = 9 THEN A.sdata2 ELSE A.sdata1 END sdata1 , CASE WHEN A.stype BETWEEN 3 AND 7 THEN A.sdata3 WHEN A.stype = 9 THEN A.sdata3 WHEN A.stype = 10 THEN A.sdata2 ELSE '' END sdata2 , CASE WHEN A.stype = 10 THEN A.sdata3 ELSE '' END sdata3 , CASE WHEN A.stype = 10 THEN A.sdata4 ELSE '' END sdata4 , CASE WHEN A.stype = 10 THEN A.sdata5 ELSE '' END sdata5 , CASE WHEN A.stype = 10 THEN A.sdata6 ELSE '' END sdata6 , A.sum1 , A.sum2 , A.sum3 , A.sum4 , A.summary FROM TB_CAPITAL_ASSET AS A WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE A.companyseq = #comNo# AND A.sdate = #sdate2# ) B ORDER BY B.DocNo

/* CapitalDAO.selectAssetListAjax7 */ SELECT A.CompanySeq , A.AccDate , A.SlipID , A.AccSeq , B.AccName , C.BankName AS RemValName1 , C.BankAccNo , A.Summary , A.CrAmt FROM SGERP.dbo._TACSlipRow AS A WITH(NOLOCK) LEFT JOIN SGERP.dbo._TDAAccount AS B WITH(NOLOCK) ON A.CompanySeq = B.CompanySeq AND A.AccSeq = B.AccSeq INNER JOIN ( SELECT A.CompanySeq , A.SlipSeq , B.BankSeq , D.MinorName AS BankName , B.BankAccSeq , B.BankAccNo FROM SGERP.dbo._TACSlipRem AS A WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN SGERP.dbo._TDABankAcc AS B WITH(NOLOCK) ON A.CompanySeq = B.CompanySeq AND A.RemValSeq = B.BankAccSeq LEFT JOIN SGERP.dbo._TDABank AS C WITH(NOLOCK) ON B.CompanySeq = C.CompanySeq AND B.BankSeq = C.BankSeq LEFT JOIN SGERP.dbo._TDAUMinor AS D WITH(NOLOCK) ON C.CompanySeq = D.CompanySeq AND C.BankHQ = D.MinorSeq WHERE A.RemSeq = 1004 ) C ON A.CompanySeq = C.CompanySeq AND A.SlipSeq = C.SlipSeq WHERE A.CompanySeq = #comNo# AND A.AccDate = #sdate# AND A.AccSeq IN ( 10, 333, 61, 11, 619, 12, 57, 13, 58, 106, 121, 445, 725 ) AND A.CrAmt > 0 ORDER BY A.AccDate, A.SlipID
